title: The Factory Floor
narrative: The workshop is repaired! Now the robot needs to restart the factory. The production lines run on repeating patterns — your robot just learned a new trick: the Repeat card. One card, many actions.

levels.name: Repeat After Me
levels.hint: Move 4 tiles forward with just a few cards. Try putting Forward inside a Repeat ×4!

levels.name: The Square
levels.hint: Collect all 4 corner gears. Notice the pattern: forward, turn right, forward, turn right... Put that pattern in a Repeat!

levels.name: Light Row
levels.hint: Light 3 lamps in a row. The pattern repeats: forward, light up. Use a Repeat ×3!

levels.name: Spiral Patrol
levels.hint: Patrol the perimeter and light the corner lamps. Pattern: 3 forwards + turn right. Repeat ×4!
